---
title: "New BioM2 Lab website is live"
date: "2026-06-15"
description: "Our redesigned lab website is now live, built with Quarto."
---

*(Example post — replace with real news.)* We've launched a refreshed lab
website built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org). Browse the [team](../team.qmd)
and [research](../research.qmd) pages, and check back here for updates on papers,
grants, and lab news.
